Title: The Perkins Polo
Body (HTML):
Our signature fit performance jersey polo. Lightweight yarn-dyed fabric with a soft hand feel and four-way stretch that moves with your swing. UPF 50+ sun protection and moisture-wicking technology keep you cool and protected from the first tee to the nineteenth hole.

Finished with a structured spread collar and our signature fit — athletic through the chest and shoulders with a clean taper at the waist. Runs true to size.

Fit: Signature
Fabric: Performance Jersey
Features: UPF 50+, Moisture-Wicking, 4-Way Stretch, Breathable
Image Alt Text: The Perkins Polo - Signature Fit Golf Polo

Title: The Yale Polo
Body (HTML):
A tailored fit performance polo for the golfer who prefers a sharper, more fitted silhouette. Same premium jersey fabric with a slimmer chest and tapered waist that sits closer to the body without restricting your swing.

Structured spread collar with internal stays that hold their shape all day. Ideal for players who size down in most brands or prefer a modern European cut.

Fit: Tailored — runs approximately one size smaller than our Signature fit. If between sizes, size up.
Fabric: Performance Jersey
Features: UPF 50+, Moisture-Wicking, 4-Way Stretch, Breathable
Image Alt Text: The Yale Polo - Tailored Fit Golf Polo

Title: The Rodgers Quarter-Zip
Body (HTML):
Lightweight enough for a sunrise tee time, polished enough for the clubhouse after. Brushed interior with a heathered exterior that layers effortlessly over any polo. Quarter-zip lets you dial in your comfort as the temperature changes through your round.

Performance fabric with moisture-wicking technology and four-way stretch. Our signature fit provides a clean, athletic silhouette without excess bulk under a vest or jacket.

Fit: Signature
Fabric: Performance Fleece
Features: Moisture-Wicking, 4-Way Stretch, Brushed Interior, Breathable

Title: The Crawford 5-Pocket Pant
Body (HTML):
Technical performance meets clean tailoring. Hidden stretch waistband moves with your swing while water-resistant finish sheds morning dew. Five-pocket styling with a modern slim taper that looks sharp from the first tee to the nineteenth hole.

Fit: Modern Slim
Fabric: Performance Twill
Features: Water-Resistant, Stretch Waistband, Quick-Dry

Title: The Maxwell Performance Short
Body (HTML):
9-inch inseam with quick-dry, moisture-managing fabric built for warm rounds. Hidden phone pocket keeps your scorecard app close. Lightweight, breathable, and sharp enough that nobody will know these are technical shorts.

Fit: Modern
Fabric: Performance Stretch
Features: Quick-Dry, Hidden Phone Pocket, 9-Inch Inseam
